editorial_note: Release-day coverage of Ubuntu 26.04 LTS ('Resolute Raccoon'), Canonical's most architecturally disruptive LTS in a decade: Rust-based coreutils and sudo as defaults, GNOME 50 Wayland-only, Linux 7.0, and a 6 GB RAM floor. Second round of editorial review corrected a fabricated Torvalds quote, an unsupported ML-DSA claim, an unsupported benchmark, and an inverted 25.10 rollout narrative.

related_articles.context: Preview coverage of the same LTS release one month before ship date
The kernel shipping inside this LTS: Linux 7.0
